# Privacy Policy — {{GAME_NAME}}

**Last updated:** {{DATE}}  
**Publisher:** {{AUTHOR}}  
**Contact:** {{CONTACT_EMAIL}}

## Overview

{{GAME_NAME}} is a 3D creative playground and multiplayer experience built with the Threshold engine. This policy describes data handled on your device and optional network features.

## Data we collect

| Data | Purpose | Stored where |
|------|---------|--------------|
| **Microphone** (optional) | Record custom sound effects in the Engine | Local device only — not uploaded unless you export a manifest with embedded audio |
| **Local saves** | World state, texture library, preferences | Browser IndexedDB / app local storage |
| **Multiplayer sessions** (optional) | Host/guest play via PeerJS | Ephemeral peer connection — no Threshold-operated account system |

We do **not** operate a central account database for this game build.

## Third-party services

- **PeerJS / relay** (if enabled): connection signaling for multiplayer. Configure your own relay for production.
- **Platform stores** (Google Play, App Store): subject to their respective policies when you download from a store.

## Children's privacy

This app is a general-audience creative tool. Parents should supervise multiplayer and microphone use.

## Changes

We may update this policy. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
